title: justicia moctli
intro: Justicia moctli, also known as Justicia, is a flowering plant native to Central and South America, particularly in the mountainous regions of Mexico and Peru. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and treating digestive problems. The herbal preparations of Justicia moctli typically involve making tea from the leaves, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal and health benefits.
